name: Gun Mob: Stickman Run
description: Start with one Commander and build a MASSIVE ARMY! ‍ Pass through the Blue (+) Gates to ADD more soldiers to your squad. The more gunners you have, the faster you destroy the enemy base! WATCH OUT FOR MINES! The road is trapped! Dodge the explosive landmines on the ground, or lose your soldiers! DESTROY ENEMY MACHINES: Face off against heavy military gear trying to stop you! Attack Helicopters in the sky! Armored Jeeps with machine guns! Giant TANKS blocking the way! Rocket Launcher enemies! USE SUPER POWER-UPS: Cant break through? Unleash chaos! Call an AIRSTRIKE to bomb everything! Throw GRENADES
instructions: HOW TO PLAY Mobile Swipe Left or Right to steer Computer Move Left A or Left Arrow larr Move Right D or Right Arrow rarr
